overall.description: First-person helicopter cockpit view flying through dense fog over a city at dusk. The AS350 instrument panel is visible as the aircraft banks and turns, revealing glimpses of the urban landscape below through the mist. Game engine footage with warm orange lighting penetrating the fog.

segments.scene_description: View from the helicopter cockpit shows the AS350 instrument panel as the aircraft flies through dense fog. The city skyline is barely visible through the mist below. The pilot's hands are visible on the controls, navigating through the low-visibility conditions.

segments.scene_description: The helicopter banks right as visibility improves, revealing commercial high-rises and residential towers through the thinning fog. Warm orange sunlight breaks through the mist, illuminating the urban landscape below. The aircraft continues its forward motion while turning to navigate the airspace.

segments.scene_description: Flying over a dense urban grid with visible road patterns and mixed industrial and residential buildings. The fog varies in density, sometimes obscuring the view and sometimes clearing to show the city blocks below. The instrument panel remains in view as the helicopter maintains steady course.

segments.scene_description: The helicopter banks left, revealing distant mountains on the horizon beyond the city limits. Fog layers are visible in the valleys below while the urban area stretches out beneath. The aircraft continues its flight path toward the mountainous terrain as the visibility shifts with the changing altitude and direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a helicopter cockpit as it navigates through dense fog that gradually clears to reveal a sprawling urban landscape and distant mountains. It begins with a view of the AS350 instrument panel and the pilot's hands as the aircraft pushes through thick mist with only a faint glimpse of the skyline below. As the helicopter banks right, the fog thins and warm orange sunlight breaks through, illuminating a dense grid of commercial high-rises and residential towers. The camera then glides over mixed industrial blocks and road patterns where the visibility fluctuates, intermittently obscuring and revealing the city streets. Finally, the aircraft banks left to open the view toward the horizon, where the urban sprawl gives way to fog-filled valleys and towering mountains in the distance.
